mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, order_no, item_id, sku_id, item_name, item_image, sku_properties, price, original_price, quantity, total_amount, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{itemId}, #{skuId}, #{itemName}, #{itemImage}, #{skuProperties}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, order_no, item_id, sku_id, item_name, item_image, sku_properties, price, original_price, quantity, total_amount, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.itemImage}, #{item.skuProperties}, #{item.price}, #{item.originalPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalAmount}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_items SET item_name = #{itemName}, item_image = #{itemImage}, sku_properties = #{skuProperties}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, quantity = #{quantity}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
